title: Stable reason-code catalog — ADR-0128 plan §28
note: Stable identifiers for every classifier decision. Reason codes are part of the public contract: consumers (lifecycle, enforcement, telemetry) may key on them. Codes are append-only; renaming/removing one is a material change requiring a Decision.

codes.CMIS_HARD_TRIGGER_WRITE_ATTEMPT: Authoritative write attempt set CMIS=100 (Class A).
codes.CMIS_VERDICT_UNCERTAIN: CMIS resolved to UNCERTAIN (30-49) — one clarifying question.
codes.DAS_FLOOR_DOMAIN_DRIVEN: Hard trigger raised the DAS floor to domain-driven.
codes.DAS_FLOOR_DISTRIBUTED_DOMAIN: Hard trigger raised the DAS floor to distributed-domain.
codes.PROFILE_NO_CODE: Implementation Profile resolved to no-code (CMIS NO_CODE).
codes.PROFILE_FROM_DAS: Implementation Profile derived from the DAS profile floor.
codes.PROFILE_ESCALATED_BY_RISK: Inherited risk raised the profile rank.
codes.PROFILE_ESCALATED_BY_BLAST: Inherited blast radius raised the profile rank.
codes.PROFILE_ESCALATED_BY_MATERIALITY: Inherited materiality raised the profile rank.
codes.ENVELOPE_DEGRADED: Classification degraded (missing policy/signals); recorded with a receipt, never a false pass.
codes.POLICY_FALLBACK_DEFAULT: Policy table absent on disk; embedded default used.
